summary:
Iteration 26 FRONTEND-ONLY test — intake questionnaire localization verified for English, Spanish, and Russian on the live preview (https://slimlight-debug.preview.emergentagent.com) at mobile viewport 390x844. All three languages render the intake intro, first question, and option buttons in the user's selected UI language — including the IntakeCard's data-testid='intake-q2' card with localized option labels. TTS is invoked with localized text. Streaming regression /api/chat/stream still works.

[1] English (miro_language='en'): PASS. Flow BEGIN → avatar-leon-btn → 'Alex' → send. Captured chat shows EN greeting 'Hi, I'm Leon — I'm here to support you. How are you feeling today?' followed by user 'Alex' and intake intro 'Nice to meet you, Alex! To work right away with your situation, I'll ask a few short questions. It will take 2–3 minutes.' followed by Q2 'Are you looking to lose weight for yourself or to help a loved one?' with options 'For myself' / 'For a loved one'. NO Russian/Cyrillic text in chat. After clicking 'For myself' the next question 'How many kilograms would you like to lose?' rendered with options 'Up to 5 kg' / '5–10 kg' / '10–20 kg' / 'More than 20 kg' — all English.

[2] Spanish (miro_language='es'): PASS. Greeting 'Hola, soy Leon — tu consejero personal. ... ¿Cómo te puedo llamar?'. After 'Alex' send: intake intro 'Encantado de conocerte, Alex. Para trabajar exactamente en tu situación, te haré unas preguntas cortas. Tomará 2–3 minutos.' + Q2 '¿Quieres bajar de peso para ti o para ayudar a un ser querido?' with options 'Para mí' / 'Para un ser querido'. No Russian text.

[3] Russian (miro_language='ru'): PASS — original behavior preserved. Greeting 'Добрый день! Я Leon...', intake intro 'Приятно познакомиться, Alex! Чтобы сразу работать точно под вашу ситуацию, задам несколько коротких вопросов. Это займёт 2–3 минуты.' + Q2 'Вы хотите снизить вес для себя или помочь кому-то из близких?' with 'Для себя' / 'Для близкого человека'.

[4] TTS payload check: PASS. Captured 6 POST /api/tts calls during Spanish run via page.route(); body[5] contained 'Encantado de conocerte, Alex. Para trabajar exactamente en tu situación, te haré unas preguntas cortas. Tomará 2–3 minutos. ¿Quieres bajar d…' — confirming the frontend sends the localized intro+firstQ text in the user's selected UI language. Earlier bodies contained the Spanish greeting 'Hola, soy Leon — tu consejero personal…' / 'Hola, soy Kylie…'. voice='male' for Leon, voice='female' for Kylie.

[5] Streaming regression: PASS. After intake started, sending free-form text 'Hola, ¿cómo estás?' produced exactly 1 POST https://slimlight-debug.preview.emergentagent.com/api/chat/stream and the AI streamed back a Spanish reply progressively into the chat ('Hola. Estoy bien, gracias. Soy Leon, tu consultor personal para trabajar con el peso…').

issues: (carry-over, cosmetic) PWA install banner reappears at the bottom of chat after a short delay even when miro_pwa_install_dismissed='1' is set in localStorage at session start — the banner overlaps the chat input briefly. Pre-existing from iter22+, not caused by intake localization changes.

critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/config/intakeQuestions.js — INTAKE_BY_LANG covers all 8 supported languages (en, ru, es, fr, de, zh, ar, hi). q5/q8 keep stable answer-keys ('yes/tried/never', 'often/sometimes/rarely/no') so SKIP_NEVER_TRIED and SKIP_NO_OVEREATING skipIf logic survives language switches mid-questionnaire — good design.

/app/frontend/src/components/chat/IntakeCard.jsx correctly reads lang via useLanguage() and renders Next/Done/Other... + data-field placeholders from getIntakeButtons(lang). data-testid='intake-q2', 'intake-q2-opt-...' etc. all present and stable.

/app/frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.jsx startIntake / handleIntakeAnswer use lang-aware getIntakeIntro / getIntakeQuestions / getIntakeOutro / nextIntakeStep / buildIntakeSummary. playTTS is called with the localized text — verified empirically via /api/tts request body capture.

Minor: buildIntakeSummary line `${v.field_age.split(' ')[0]}: ${name}` is a hack to label the user's name — works for EN ('Age: Alex') but produces odd labels in other locales (e.g. RU 'Возраст: Alex', ZH '年龄: Alex'). Consider adding an explicit summary_name label per locale. Non-blocking.
Streaming wiring (/api/chat/stream) confirmed live: POST observed in network log immediately after a free-form user message; SSE streamed Spanish reply progressively in UI.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all targeted localization scenarios pass (en, es, ru) + TTS body localization + /chat/stream regression

test_credentials.flow: anonymous guest (no login required for intake/chat)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter26 verified intake questionnaire is now fully localized across en/es/ru on mobile 390x844. Spanish TTS POST body confirmed contains localized 'Encantado de conocerte, Alex…' text. Other 5 supported langs (fr, de, zh, ar, hi) were not exercised end-to-end but the same INTAKE_BY_LANG dict + getIntakeButtons/Intro/Outro/nextIntakeStep helpers feed all of them — spot-check any single non-Russian non-EN-non-ES locale to confirm parity. Fast path for any retest: localStorage.setItem('miro_pwa_install_dismissed','1'); set 'miro_language'+'miro_lang_v3'='1'; reload; click [data-testid=landing-cta-overlay] → [data-testid=avatar-leon-btn] → fill [data-testid=chat-input] with 'Alex' → [data-testid=send-btn] → wait 3s → assert [data-testid=intake-q2] present and option button text matches expected per locale.
rca_of_issue: N/A — feature addition test, not bug.
